arts.ttl: Official: Torino Sign Former Napoli Midfielder on Loan
arts.sum: Bundesliga powerhouse RB Leipzig confirmed Elif Elmas' switch to Serie A underachievers Torino on loan with an option to buy. Indeed, the German club issued a statement on Friday to announce the agreement. The post Official: Torino Sign Former Napoli Midfielder on Loan appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Ninth Place Finish in Champions League “Extraordinary”, Says Marino
arts.sum: Atalanta's Director General Umberto Marino expressed his delight with the club's performance in this season's UEFA Champions League, hailing their ninth-place finish as an "extraordinary achievement". Speaking to Sky Sports following the Champions League playoff draw, Marino reflected on the team's impressive campaign and looked ahead to their upcoming playoff tie. The post Atalanta’s Ninth Place Finish in Champions League “Extraordinary”, Says Marino appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Scalvini Faces Potential Season-Ending Shoulder Surgery
arts.sum: The Atalanta squad has returned to Bergamo with mixed emotions following their 2-2 draw against Barcelona in the Champions League. While the result didn't secure a direct spot in the top eight, it has undoubtedly boosted the team's morale and reinforced their belief in their abilities.
